harness_value_options.description: Show subscription value for the focused harness
Claude plan for value calculation: pro | max-5x | max-20x | a monthly price
Codex plan override: plus | pro | a monthly price

summary_value_options.description: Quick time range (also accepted as a bare word, e.g. `summary mtd`)
